calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sara Crummett, Respondent/Plaintiff present in Pro Per.
Timothy Lyons, Appellant/Defendant present in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Sara Crummet testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Demand for Payment Letter
Exhibit 2 - Statement of Security Deposit

Timothy Lyons testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Letter
Exhibit B - Security Deposit Balance Statement
Exhibit C - Letter re Phone Bill
Exhibit D - copy of Check
Exhibit E - Emails
Exhibit F - Copy of Sublet Agreement

The court overrules the objection by the Respondent in reference to the Notice of Hearing. The case will be decided on the merrits only. At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Nancy Newman, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (525)
